name: silent_drop_probe
notes: The run-23 silent-drop reproduction. State: a tenant with a COMPLETE journey + owner_inputs=true, paced post-profile flow already at the READINESS-ASK beat (__flow__='ready_asked') — VT-582 calibration fix: without an explicit --flow, a COMPLETE journey has NO __flow__ sentinel and _maybe_handle_post_profile_flow returns None immediately (falls straight to the normal brain pipeline), so step 1 never even reaches the integration beats being tested here. Step 1's affirm resolves the readiness ask -> offers the easiest integration (Shopify) -> sets __flow__='integration:shopify'; step 2 is the load-bearing bare-URL probe. EXPECTED-FAIL until the drop is fixed; flips to XPASS when a reply is produced. Run: `setup --owner-inputs true --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> silent_drop_probe.json`.

steps.message: I want to connect my Shopify store
steps.note: Enter the integration:shopify flow. Expect the integration agent to ask for the store URL (a logged reply). May itself be silent depending on state — that is also informative.

THE run-23 probe: a bare URL after the pending owner-input was cleared. Expect the store link to be picked up and acknowledged; the drop class produces NOTHING -> silent -> XFAIL. When fixed this flips to XPASS (flagged) — re-check the mark.
